Idea Name: AI-Driven Crime Pattern Analysis and Predictive Policing System
Expected benefits:
Improved crime prevention.
Efficient resource deployment.
Enhanced public safety.
Idea Description: The project focuses on building an AI system that analyzes crime records, location data, time patterns, and socio-economic factors to predict crime hotspots and trends. The system assists law enforcement agencies in strategic planning and preventive policing.
potentail Challenges:
Bias in historical crime data.
Ethical and legal constraints.
Public trust and transparency.
